mapper.sql: id, name, vehicleNumber, deviceSn, simNumber, authToken, authMode, defaultRouteId, serverAddress, serverPort, initialMileage, remark, enabled
mapper.select:
select count(*) from x_device_profile
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or vehicleNumber like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or deviceSn like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or simNumber like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: insert into x_device_profile (id, name, vehicleNumber, deviceSn, simNumber, authToken, authMode, defaultRouteId, serverAddress, serverPort, initialMileage, remark, enabled) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vehicleNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{simNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defaultRouteId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serverAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serverPort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{initialMileage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabled,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.update: update x_device_profile set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vehicleNumber = #{vehicleNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deviceSn = #{deviceSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, simNumber = #{simNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, authToken = #{authToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, authMode = #{authMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, defaultRouteId = #{defaultRouteId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, serverAddress = #{serverAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, serverPort = #{serverPort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, initialMileage = #{initialMileage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
